title: glyph
text: glyph An image stored as a compressed object in a legacy format that is proprietary to Uniface, for use in forms, panels, and menus. Related Links Glyphs Glyphs are images in a Uniface-proprietary format, which can be used as background images in forms, entities and application shells, and as icons in widgets, panel buttons, menus, and drag-and-drop formats.
